The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress

Video.summary: Marketing executives Kristen and Dave bought their modest first home a few years ago and undertook the much-needed renovations themselves. They did a great job removing walls and installing a new kitchen but then ran out of steam. Now they need designer Samantha Pynn's expertise to pull their open concept kitchen/dining/living room together and turn it into the beautiful modern space that they had originally envisioned.
Video.title: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor

Image.alt: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor
Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor

Video.summary: Creating a living space that works for both kids and adults shouldn't mean you have to compromise on grown-up style. By using natural fibers and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamorous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.
Video.title: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room
Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Doll Television Dinner Table & Tray

Video.summary: DIY! Let's make Care Bears doll nursery, crib mini figures, custom rug & more!

My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make Care Bears Nursery - Mini Figures - Custom Rug & More

Video.summary: Claudia and Justin are professional foodies - he's a chef and she's a food stylist. So it's no surprise that their urban loft space has a beautifully designed modern kitchen. Only problem is, the rest of the space doesn't measure up: it's a mishmash of Danish modern with other inherited and found pieces. Designer Samantha Pynn uses their showpiece kitchen as an inspiration and by recovering older teak pieces with eco-friendly fabrics and redoing the floor plan.
Video.title: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room
Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room

Video.summary: Need a last minute gift idea!? Check out this Fabulous and EASY Doll Craft! Stay warm this Winter with these Fabsome Fuzzy Doll Slippers! Your dolls will LOVE these fabulous slippers and they make the perfect last minute gift on a budget!!

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Fuzzy Doll Slippers EASY & Quick

Video.summary: The cottage-style charm that Virginia fell in love with when she bought her city home has lost its appeal. Designer Samantha Pynn takes it from outdated to 'Modern Country' - with an eco-twist.
Video.title: Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen

Image.alt: Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen
Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen

Video.summary: Get your Dolls ready for Easter with these Fabulous Crafts! From Cute Bunny ears to Chocolate Bunnies ... we've got you covered!

Video.summary: Craft along with Froggy as she transforms the Violet Costumed Action Figure into a one of a kind Custom Doll! Create the Incredibles 2 Violet alter Ego ... you know ... Violet without her Costume!!

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Incredibles 2 Violet CUSTOM DOLL
My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Incredibles 2 Violet CUSTOM DOLL

Video.summary: For many first-time homeowners, decorating - especially private spaces like the bedroom - is definitely last on the list. That's certainly the case for Tiffany, an up and coming PR executive. By refreshing some of Tiffany's vintage furniture and bringing in some modern pieces and sustainable choices, host Samantha Pynn takes Tiffany's dorm-like bedroom with its mish-mash of furnishings and transforms it into an eclectic and soothing space, full of the sophistication a professional woman deserves.
Video.title: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom

Image.alt: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom
Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom

Video.summary: We hope you're ready for a EXTREME CRAFT!!! Craft along with Froggy as she makes a Doll Pool 4! A REAL WORKING Pool, Deck and Pool House!

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Doll Pool 4 and Working Pool House Deck

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Crochet? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get started and then move you onb to some simple projects such as making bunting and a crochet basket. You will find out what equipment you'll need, learn different crochet stitches and look at finishing techniques.
Video.title: Learn to Crochet

Image.alt: Learn to Crochet
Learn to Crochet
